calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-27-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT PACIFIC RESEARCH INSTITUTE's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Off calendar per dismissal filed June 26, 2012. Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Melanie Gheno CSR # 7489

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-03-2012 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-04-2012 Continued To Jul-18-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-12-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Steven Koyanagi, Esq., from Jackson Lewis, 415-394-9400, for defendants and moving party

No other Appearance. Tentative Ruling is adopted.
DEFENDANTS PACIFIC RESEARCH INSTITUTE, MEGAN KELLY AND SALLY PIPES' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT -
Sustained, with ten days leave to amend. The court did not receive courtesy copies of the opposition papers. Order signed in open court. Judge: James J. McBride; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077
